text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Vrrrrmmm...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We're on the bus to summer camp.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the Japan Cup right on the horizon, this will
be an important time for Manhattan Cafe.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Leckermaul...
choice_data_list: Is that word on your mind?
Is that word on your mind?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Yes, it just keeps on popping into my head.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: It's unsettling to say out loud... Leckermaul...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: ...Excuse me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The student sitting next to us strikes up a
conversation.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
...Did you just say Leckermaul? Are you a fan of
German fairy tales?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Huh, fairy tales? No, I... wouldn't say that...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The student beside us is Eishin Flash, who hails
from Germany.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She might know more about "Leckermaul," which
seems to be of German origin.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Is Leckermaul a German word?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Yes. It is a person's name.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: In the German fairy tale, "Leckermaul" is...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: The name of a witch.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: A witch...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The conversation takes a strange turn. I glance
over to Agnes Tachyon, who's sitting next to me...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hm, yes, I heard... but I can't say I was listening.
Anyhow, perhaps now's a good time...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Look, Trainer, Cafe—there's something I should
let you know.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I won't be having anything to do with either of
you this summer.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: What? Tachyon...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I'll be a little tied up with my own plans, you see.
They're mostly meaningless matters, but they
can't be avoided...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Just act as if I'm not around and go about your
business as a duo.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The bus drives on, carrying all manner of
uncertainties. None of us know what to expect at
the campgrounds.
